backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the G&S Medical backend, implementing OTP generation/verification, user profile management, approval workflows, and customer/order/product data management using access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that Shushant Waghmare's clickable +91 9156896495 tel: link has been added to the About Us page, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-54.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, components, and utilities across customer, admin, and seller areas of the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the G&S Medical frontend app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that configures TanStack Router with all customer, admin, and seller routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, CartProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a styled access-denied message with a shield icon and a button linking back to the homepage, used when a non-admin user attempts to access restricted areas.
frontend/src/components/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout component with a sidebar navigation (dashboard, products, orders, refunds, sellers with pending badge), authentication guard that redirects to /admin/login if unauthenticated, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedCheckmar: SVG animated checkmark component with a drawing circle and check animation, respecting the user's reduced-motion preference to skip animations.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementTick: Displays a horizontally scrolling marquee banner with promotional announcements, respecting the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/src/components/AuthLayout.tsx: Two-panel authentication layout with a branded left panel (logo, stats, floating shapes) and a right panel that renders form children, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/ConfettiEffect.t: Renders a one-shot confetti particle animation using randomly positioned colored squares, skipped entirely when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/components/FloatingShapes.t: Decorative background layer that renders animated floating pill shapes and medical-cross SVG icons, with animations disabled for reduced-motion users.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with a wave SVG top edge, brand info, quick navigation links, contact details, and a bottom copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, seller portal button, cart icon with animated badge, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root page layout that composes Header, Footer, MobileBottomNav, ProfileSetupModal, and an Outlet for nested routes.
Fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile screens with Home, Products, Cart (with badge), and Account links using active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/OrderDetailsModa: Dialog modal that displays full order details (customer info, items, status) and allows a seller to update the order status via a dropdown.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a single product card with image, badges (Rx, out-of-stock, medicine type), price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. Supports fade-in animation with reduced-motion awareness.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Admin dialog form for adding or editing a medicine product, including image upload, all product fields, and calls to add/update product mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name, phone, and address to create a profile; shown only when the user is logged in but has no existing profile.
frontend/src/components/ScrollToTopButto: Fixed floating button that appears after scrolling 300px and smoothly scrolls the page back to the top, respecting reduced-motion preferences.
frontend/src/components/SellerLayout.tsx: Shared layout wrapper for seller portal pages providing a responsive sidebar with navigation links (Dashboard, Products, Orders, Profile) and a logout action.
frontend/src/components/SellerProductFor: Dialog form for sellers to add or edit their own medicine products, similar to ProductForm but authenticated with sellerId and passwordHash via seller-specific mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonProductC: Placeholder skeleton card with shimmer animations matching the ProductCard layout, used as a loading state.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a color-coded pill badge for order, payment, or refund statuses using predefined Tailwind color maps.
frontend/src/components/TypewriterText.t: Animates text character-by-character at a configurable speed with a blinking cursor, instantly showing full text when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for shopping cart state, supporting add/remove/update/clear operations with BigInt price handling and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Returns a cached backend actor instance (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Manages admin authentication state with login/logout functions, persisting session in localStorage and verifying it against the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAnimatedCounter.ts: Animates a numeric counter from a start value to a target using requestAnimationFrame with a configurable easing function, respecting the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerAuth.ts: Manages customer authentication state including login, registration, and logout, persisting the customer session in localStorage and fetching the customer profile from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: A generic hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track whether a referenced DOM element is visible, with configurable threshold, rootMargin, and trigger-once behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend data operations including fetching products and categories, and mutations for adding, updating, and deleting products and orders.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts: Returns a boolean indicating whether the user has requested reduced motion, reactively updating via the prefers-reduced-motion media query.
frontend/src/hooks/useSellerAuth.ts: Custom React hook that manages seller authentication state using localStorage sessions, providing login/logout functions and seller profile data fetched via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and adds utility classes for animations and styled components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for G&S Medical pharmacy displaying the company mission, core values, and contact information with a hero section and styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays summary statistics (products, orders, revenue, status counts) and a list of recent orders using data fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with an email/password form that authenticates via the useAdminAuth hook and redirects to the admin panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/AdminOrdersPage.tsx: Admin page for viewing and managing orders, featuring a searchable/sortable orders table and a modal dialog for viewing order details and updating order status.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProductsPage.tsx: Admin page for managing the medicine product catalog, with search, add, edit, and delete functionality using a table layout and a product form modal.
frontend/src/pages/AdminRefundsPage.tsx: Admin page for reviewing and managing customer refund requests, with search and status filter controls and inline status update via a dropdown.
frontend/src/pages/AdminSellersPage.tsx: Admin page for managing seller accounts, displaying a filterable list of sellers with verification status badges and approve/reject actions, plus a banner for pending applications.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Customer-facing shopping cart page that reads cart data from localStorage, supports quantity updates and item removal with animations, and displays an animated running total.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page with pharmacy contact info (phone, email, address, hours) and a form that submits customer inquiries via the useSubmitInquiry hook.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLoginPage.tsx: Provides a tabbed login/register page for customers with a two-step flow: credential entry followed by OTP verification via the actor's generateOtp method.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page with a hero section, announcement ticker, animated stats, featured products grid, and cart management stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: Displays a simple 404 error page with a search icon and a button linking back to the homepage.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Shows an order confirmation page with the order ID (read from URL params), next-steps instructions, customer care phone numbers, and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Handles the checkout flow by displaying cart summary, a UPI ID to copy for payment, and a form collecting customer details and UPI transaction reference before placing the order via usePlaceOrder.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Displays a browsable, filterable product catalog with search, category, and prescription filters, sticky filter bar, and add-to-cart functionality backed by localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDashboardPage.t: Seller dashboard overview showing stats (total/available products, total/pending orders), quick action buttons, and a recent orders list with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/SellerLoginPage.tsx: Multi-step seller login flow handling credential verification, OTP generation/verification via phone, and routing based on seller verification status (approved, pending, or rejected).
frontend/src/pages/SellerOrdersPage.tsx: Seller orders management page with search and status filtering, a tabular order list, and a detail dialog for viewing individual order information.
frontend/src/pages/SellerProductsPage.ts: Seller product management page supporting search, add/edit via a form modal, and delete with confirmation dialog, using React Query mutations for CRUD operations.
frontend/src/pages/SellerProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated seller's profile including store information, owner details, and document verification status with visual badges for verified/pending/rejected states.
frontend/src/pages/SellerRegisterPage.ts: Multi-step seller registration form (store info → document upload → OTP verification) that collects credentials, Aadhaar/PAN/license numbers, and verifies phone via OTP before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/utils/sortHelpers.ts: Provides utility functions to sort an array of Orders by date or total amount in ascending or descending order.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, font families, border radii, and a rich set of keyframe animations for the frontend UI.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 25) describing the G&S Medical online store's architecture, existing features, known issues, and multi-vendor marketplace plans including DigiLocker-based seller verification.
